summary: The fix removes seed hardwiring only for the `default` composition; non-default compositions can still place sessions against the wrong live modes/routing.

findings.title: Placement still ignores the active composition and always resolves config from `compositions/default`
findings.recommendation: Thread the active composition id into `/api/orchestrator/place` and call `resolvePlacementPaths` with that value. The current caller also needs to send composition context when starting an orchestrated dev-env session, otherwise any non-default composition will still use `compositions/default` live config or its seed fallback.
